ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated, obsolete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the characteristic */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the characteristic */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the characteristic (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the characteristic */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the characteristic is required */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the characteristic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the characteristic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the characteristic the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Value of the rating */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the rating */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the rating value (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the rating */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the characteristic the symbol belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the characteristic */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of the symbol (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the symbol */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the symbol was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbols_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the characteristic the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note or comment about the characteristic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the note was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* The date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit symbol (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the unit was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_characteristics" (
  "version_characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version characteristic */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the characteristic */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rating of the characteristic */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the characteristic is mandatory in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version characteristic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the version characteristic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_characteristics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_characteristics_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_characteristics_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "component_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the version is active for the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the component version relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the component version relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_users" (
  "component_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component user relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The access level of the user for the component (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the component user relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the component user relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_users_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access_logs" (
  "component_access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component access log relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access log */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The access level during the access event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the component access log relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the component access log relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_logs_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES access_logs ("access_id")
)
